query: Computer, access personal logs on Shuttlecraft Curie. Show my log entry for Stardate 47391.2.
response: There is no log entry from the Shuttlecraft Curie for that stardate.

query: Computer, display any log entries regarding the Bat'leth tournament on Forcas Three.
response: Personal log, stardate 47391.2. There has been a malfunction in the ship's main deflector. It will require two more days of repairs.
